title: circRNA-engineered macrophages mediate localized MMP9 neutralization to rejuvenate aged bone.
snippet: Aging causes osteoporosis, delayed fracture repair, and osteoarthritis, but mechanisms and therapies remain unclear. Transcriptomics of serum and bone from older patients showed marked MMP9 upregulation, highlighting systemic MMP9 neutralization as a potential immunotherapy. Here, we developed ancircRNA-based antibody-engineering strategy that specifically....
